narrative:
Findlay City has 25,597 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.0 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -9.6% D−R vs -34.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
